content: Your acceptance-driven fixes are reflected in the merged queue state now. I verified the current spreadsheet test surface passes, including the paste/redo and column-structure cases you called out earlier. I’m proceeding to final submission.

I re-homed the only remaining orphaned delta onto a clean Carol branch from current main and opened PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/229. It is just the column insert/delete rewrite regression test that still passed on trunk after your #228 merge.

Confirmed https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/228 is already merged into `run/facebook/main` at `2656ae36b46b450a58d327f25e50b6929a693eb4`, so there is no pending reviewer action left on your paste/redo fix PR.
